text: One of the most important aspects of successful repair is the appropriate identification of the injury.
Thereafter, careful dissection around the injury is important in order to be able to provide a comfortable repair.
In this situation, the surgeon opted for an interrupted mattress suturing utilising Prolin 3.0.

You will also notice that due to the patient's age and the fact that we're dealing with the left main bronchial stump surrounding vascularised tissue was also utilised as a pledget to reinforce the repair.
